description: Research -> draft -> review. The draft step does the heavy lifting; research and review can run on a smaller/cheaper model via the optional per-node 'model' field to keep token cost down.

nodes.instruction: Gather the key facts, constraints, and sources needed to satisfy the request. Output concise bullet facts only.
Produce the main deliverable using the research. For long-form work, write section by section so length is not a constraint.
Tighten the draft, fact-check it against the research, and finalize. Return only the final deliverable.
